updateNote: Day 49 12:20 PM PT refresh: Trump declares Israel 'PROHIBITED' from Lebanon strikes — unprecedented public US-Israel split after Netanyahu said Hezbollah fight 'not over.' Iran FM Araghchi says Hormuz 'completely open' for commercial traffic; US CENTCOM blockade of Iranian ports continues (Day 4). Macron-Starmer host ~30-nation Hormuz summit in London — France/UK refuse to join US blockade; US not invited. Israeli drone kills motorcyclist and wounds 3 medics in Lebanon — first fatal ceasefire violations. Oil crashes further: Brent $91.85, WTI $88.10. Gas AAA $4.072. S&P hits intraday record 7,038 on Trump 'very close to being over' remarks. USS Bush CSG transits Gibraltar eastbound. Ceasefire expires April 22 (5 days).
dataFreshnessWarning: Data updated as of 12:20 PM PDT April 17, 2026 (Day 49). Ceasefire Day 10 of Iran war; Day 1 of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holding despite violations. Iran declares Hormuz open for commercial traffic; US blockade of Iranian ports continues.
